name: Anika Sharma
title: Best sunscreen I've ever used
review: I ordered the Berry Bright Sunscreen after seeing it recommended online and honestly it exceeded every expectation. The texture is so lightweight and it blends into the skin without any white cast. I wore it on a 38-degree day in Delhi and my skin stayed protected without feeling heavy or greasy. I've already recommended it to four friends. Conscious Chemist really understands what daily SPF should feel like.

name: Rhea Kapoor
title: SPF done right
review: I've tried sunscreens from a lot of brands and most either leave a white cast or feel sticky after an hour. Conscious Chemist's Berry Bright is different — it stays matte and non-greasy throughout the day. The formula is perfect for Mumbai's humidity. No breakouts, no heaviness. The slight berry tint gives the most natural finish. Will never switch.

name: Meera Pillai
title: Lightweight and effective
review: Ordered the Berry Bright and the Blackhead Melting Water together. Both arrived well-packaged and the quality is genuinely impressive for the price. The sunscreen has a comfortable, skin-like finish and the SPF 50/PA++++ makes me feel genuinely protected. My one small note — the tube could be slightly bigger — but the product itself is excellent. Using it every single morning now.

name: Divya Nair
title: Exactly what I was looking for
review: I've been looking for a sunscreen that doesn't make my oily skin look shiny within an hour. Conscious Chemist is exactly that. The Berry Bright feels premium but is priced reasonably. Used it for two months now — no breakouts, no clogged pores. The Niacinamide is visibly working on my dark spots. This is the kind of skincare staple you keep forever.

name: Sanya Khanna
title: Applies straight from the tube
review: No mixing, no layering issues — just pump and blend. The Berry Bright Sunscreen has that effortless skin-finish that's hard to find in Indian sunscreens. The formula absorbs within seconds. SPF 50 gives real confidence outdoors. Delivery was faster than expected too. One of my favourite skincare purchases this year.

name: Ishita Roy
title: Best skincare brand I've found
review: Everything from Conscious Chemist just works. Clean formulas, effective actives, great pricing.

name: Tanvi Mehta
title: Protected all day
review: Wore the Berry Bright for a 10-hour outdoor day and my skin looked as fresh in the evening as it did in the morning. Zero retouch needed.

name: Preethi Subramanian
title: True to description
review: The zero white cast claim is actually true — rare for an Indian sunscreen. Blends completely into my NC40 skin tone without any greyness.

name: Zara Qureshi
title: Second purchase, won't be my last
review: Bought the Berry Bright first, loved it so much I immediately ordered the Acne Spot Corrector Gel. Conscious Chemist has a loyal customer in me.

name: Nidhi Gupta
title: Clean formula, visible results
review: Quality is impressive. No harmful ingredients, dermatologist-tested, and the Niacinamide is genuinely brightening my skin after just 3 weeks.

name: Aarohi Jain
title: Featherlight SPF
review: Perfect summer staple. The sunscreen barely feels like you're wearing anything — yet fully protected from UV rays.

name: Kritika Bose
title: Works for all skin types
review: Bought for my dry skin and my sister with oily skin — both of us love it. That's rare for a sunscreen.

name: Puja Ahluwalia
title: Skin is visibly brighter
review: Three months in and my skin is noticeably brighter. No tanning, no dullness. This is my ride-or-die SPF.

name: Kavya Reddy
title: CC gets skincare right
review: Clean actives, honest formulas. Exactly what conscious skincare should be.

name: Simran Batra
title: My everyday SPF
review: Reaches for this sunscreen every single morning. That says everything.
